text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Copano Rickey really wants to enter the
Japanese Derby, we experience some minor
trouble right before it begins.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crash!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Ouuuch, that smarts...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: I'm okay. I just twisted my ankle a little.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I see. So this is what my feng shui was warning me
about... Things might have ended a lot worse if
this were the actual race.
choice_data_list: Well, so much for running in the Derby...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having suffered a light sprain, she is forced to
withdraw from the race. What she decides to do
instead, however...

text_block_list.name: Commentator MC
text_block_list.text:
Welcome to Uma Dash 7—the UmaTube channel
bringing you live-streamed races with a breezy,
upbeat vibe!

text_block_list.name: Commentator MC
text_block_list.text:
Today, we're bringing you the Japanese Derby,
and our special guest is none other than the
Umamusume who's been making waves with her
feng shui, Copano Rickey!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Hellooo! Rickey! ☆ Lucky! ☆ Super happy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She chooses to appear on an UmaTube
commentator channel.

text_block_list.name: Commentator MC
text_block_list.text:
So, Rickey, before we get to your predictions... I
wanted to ask if there was a chance you would've
entered this race?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
There was! And because of that, I'm quite familiar
with each runner's potential. Having thoroughly
researched the venue, I think my predictions
should be fairly accurate.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So, if we're talking about the Japanese Derby...
this year is said to be a showdown between four
powerful titans.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The favorite for this race normally chases from
the rear of the pack, but the Derby is a race
where you need to stay up front if you're hoping
to win.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The pace is quite slow on the whole, so there's a
high chance the leaders will stay in the lead. The
odds are against her. However...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The favorite is number one in bracket one. And
today's lucky color is white! Also...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The inner track is a vivid shade of green. Her
affinity couldn't be better!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So, from a feng shui perspective, she shouldn't
have any problem pushing through.

text_block_list.name: Commentator MC
text_block_list.text:
Some people are predicting it might be difficult
for her if she gets boxed in though.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I think she'll manage to push through all the same.
White waves carry more power than blue surges,
after all.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Also, besides the four titans, there's another
Umamusume worth keeping an eye on—bracket
two, post three, the black-haired runner.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
As for the "white wave" Umamusume... The
stronger her performance from the back of the
pack, the farther her light will reach, drowning
out the shadows ahead. Keep an eye on her! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey's feng shui-themed commentary
keeps everyone hyped. And then...

text_block_list.name: Commentator MC
text_block_list.text:
Unbelievable?! Number one takes the win! She
came surging from behind along the outside, and
delivered exactly what her fans had hoped!

text_block_list.name: Commentator MC
text_block_list.text:
And how about Rickey's other mark—number
three from bracket two...

text_block_list.name: Commentator MC
text_block_list.text:
Third place! She crosses the finish line in third
place! With an incredible start and strong
perseverance, her display today far exceeded her
popularity!

text_block_list.name: Commentator MC
text_block_list.text: Rickey, how did you know?!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing special. I considered all their talent
and luck, then chose the racers who appeared on
top.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The racers I named, the people watching us from
home—anyone can call forth happiness by
shaping their environment! That is feng shui. ☆

text_block_list.name: Commentator MC
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, that's truly incredible! I feel like I've
gotten a glimpse into the true power of feng shui!

text_block_list.name: Commentator MC
text_block_list.text:
Rickey, make sure you come and hang out with us
again sometime!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: I'd be happy to! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Several days after the Japanese Derby...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Ah, look Trainer! That store over there!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! The feng shui shop is packed with people!
I've never seen it this crowded before!

text_block_list.name: High School Girl A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, check out these stones. Aren't they so
pretty? Apparently, it's best to get them in your
lucky color.

text_block_list.name: High School Girl B
text_block_list.text:
I'm thinking about buying a book. I wanna know
the best things to place near my pillow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The shop is bustling with crowds of customers.
There's even a large banner outside.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: The banner says... let's see—Popularized by Copano Rickey! The Miraculous Power of Feng Shui!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Haha... I'm glad that it's becoming popular, but
branding it as miraculous seems a bit over the
top.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Personally, I prefer a more grounded approach
showing people how practicing feng shui leads to
improving one's own luck.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The presentation may be hyperbolic, but it's
better than having no one interested at all.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
This must be because of what I did during the
Japanese Derby. I knew it would garner a whole
different level of attention! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I hope now even more people will start getting
interested in feng shui!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Several days after that...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Trainer, check out this letter! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It says, "Trying out your feng shui has made me a
little more positive-minded! Now, I'm a huge
fan! ♪"

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I can really feel it—feng shui is gradually
helping spread happiness to everyone.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yep, yep, this is perfect! As we enter the ninth
solar term, summer welcomes us with a bountiful
harvest! ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: I hope my feng shui spreads far and wide! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While she wasn't able to run in the Derby herself
like initially planned, Copano Rickey's accurate
Derby predictions do the trick, sparking a feng
shui craze.
